pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_nextgen_connect.sh:84, setup_task.sh:35, export_result.sh:42,43,55,60, verifier.py:43,45
Hardcoded in export_result.sh:55 (test message), export_result.sh:66 (grep check), verifier.py:89
Hardcoded in export_result.sh:60 (test message), export_result.sh:72 (grep check)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creation of a NextGen Connect channel named 'Canonical_XML_Transformer' that listens on TCP port 6661 for HL7 v2.3 ADT messages and writes transformed XML output to /home/ga/xml_out/. All data is synthetic: sample HL7 data is generated in setup_task.sh with synthetic patient records (MRN12345, DOE^JOHN), and verification tests use hardcoded synthetic MRNs (TEST_M_999 for male, TEST_F_888 for female). No real patient data is used. The environment uses NextGen Connect Docker image version 4.5.0 with PostgreSQL backend and MLLP protocol for message transport.
